description_long: This object is a compact, single-barrel firearm with a robust, metallic body and a wooden pistol grip. The main body is finished in a dark, glossy blue-black color, featuring a cylindrical barrel integrated into a rectangular upper receiver. The grip is ergonomically shaped and made of wood, providing a visual and tactile contrast to the metal components. There are two prominent iron sights mounted on the top, one at the front and one at the rear, for aiming. The trigger guard is rounded and extends below the grip, and the muzzle is visible at the front end. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, possibly single-shot or break-action rifle, suitable for urban or close-quarters use.
description: A compact, metallic rifle with a wooden pistol grip and iron sights, featuring a dark glossy finish and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening, front sight post, and the alignment of the barrel with the receiver.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rectangular upper receiver, wooden grip, trigger guard, and both iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, rear sight, and the full width of the wooden grip.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the metallic body, wooden grip, and the iron sights from the opposite side.
